SPRING PAPRIKA BASIL CHICKEN PASTA✨(FULL RECIPE BELOW) This creamy pasta is perfect for spring & Easter meals! I’m using McCormick® Basil Leaves & Paprika to bring all the flavor without extra fuss, trusted in kitchens for 135 years! @McCormick Spices  It’s easy, approachable, and the perfect weeknight pasta, you’ll make it again and again! The KEY ingredients here are McCormick® Basil Leaves & Paprika to really bring out the flavor! Find more inspiration at McCormick.com ✨ Chicken * 1 lb boneless skinless chicken breasts or thighs * 1 tsp salt * ½ tsp black pepper * 1 tsp garlic powder * 1 tsp basil * 1 tsp paprika * 1 tbsp olive oil Pasta & Sauce * 8 oz ditalini pasta * 2 tbsp butter * 2 garlic cloves, minced * ½ cup heavy cream * ½ cup grated Parmesan * 1 tsp basil * 1 tsp paprika * salt & pepper to taste * juice of 1 lemon * fresh basil, chopped Method 1. Season chicken: Toss chicken with salt, pepper, garlic powder, basil, and paprika. 2. Cook chicken: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook chicken 4–5 minutes per side until golden and cooked through. Rest, then slice. 3. Make sauce: In the same pan melt butter. Add garlic and cook 30 seconds. Stir in cream, Parmesan, basil, paprika, salt, and pepper. Simmer 2–3 minutes until slightly thickened. 4. Cook pasta: Boil pasta until al dente. Drain and add to the sauce. 5. Finish: Add chicken, squeeze lemon juice over top, and toss. Garnish with fresh basil and serve! #McCormickPartner #Recipeshare #EasyRecipe #PastaLover #SpringMeals

#SargentoPartner Cheeseburger crunch wrap with a honey grilled onion ring on top. Sargento® Natural American Cheese on hot beef and it just immediately does its thing. #ad Recipe below:  Cheeseburger Crunch Wraps with Honey Grilled Onion Ring Makes 2 Ingredients - 1 lb ground beef  - Salt and pepper to taste - 4 burrito-sized flour tortillas  - 2 tostada shells  - Sargento® Natural American Cheese, 1 slice per patty (or more, follow your heart)  - 1 romaine hearts, chopped  - 1 tomato diced  - 2 thin rings onions - Honey Burger Sauce - ¼ cup mayo  - 2 tbsp ketchup  - 2 tsp mustard  - 3 tbsp pickles, chopped  - 2 tsp apple cider vinegar - Pinch of garlic powder  - Pinch of paprika - Salt and pepper to taste Instructions 1. Chop romaine hearts and dice tomato. Set aside. 2. Cut 2 of the flour tortillas into smaller rounds, roughly the size of a tostada shell. Set aside. 3. Mix all burger sauce ingredients together. Taste and adjust to your liking. 4. Season ground beef with salt and pepper. Brown in a cast iron skillet over medium-high heat, breaking it up as it cooks. 5. While the beef is still hot, lay Sargento® Natural American Cheese slices directly on top and let them melt. 6. Build the wraps: spread burger sauce on a large tortilla, add beef and melted cheese, place a tostada shell on top, spread more burger sauce, add tomato and romaine, then top with the small cut tortilla. Fold the edges of the large tortilla up and over to close. 7. Place the wrap seal side down in the cast iron skillet. Sear until golden and sealed. 8. Remove the wrap. Place onion rings in the same skillet, sear until charred on one side, flip, and drizzle with honey. 9. Place the crunch wrap back in the pan, top side down, directly onto the honey onion ring. Carefully slide a spatula underneath and flip so the onion ring is sitting on top. 10. Cut in half and serve. #Sargentopartner #dinnerideas
